code:
---
title: Sequence Diagram - Mobile Biometric Authentication
config:
  theme: base
---
%% QuantumZero UML palette note: actors/external=#fff7e6/#b45309, system/component=#e0f2fe/#075985, datastore=#ecfccb/#4d7c0f, notes=#fff9c4/#d97706. Aligns diagrams to Deliverable 1 UML/DFD theme.
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  actor User as Holder
  participant UI as Flutter UI
  participant Bio as BiometricService
  participant Plugin as local_auth
  participant OS as OS Auth Prompt (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)

  User->>UI: Unlock wallet / access protected feature
  UI->>Bio: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
  activate Bio
  Bio->>Plugin: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
  activate Plugin
  Plugin->>OS: Prompt user
  activate OS

  alt Authentication Success
    OS-->>Plugin: Success
    Plugin-->>Bio: true
    Bio-->>UI: true
    UI-->>User: Access granted
  else Authentication Failed/Cancelled
    OS-->>Plugin: Failure / Cancel
    Plugin-->>Bio: false
    Bio-->>UI: false
    UI-->>User: Access denied
  end

  deactivate OS
  deactivate Plugin
  deactivate Bio
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个移动端生物识别认证的时序图，场景是Holder解锁钱包或者访问受保护功能。核心流程是Flutter UI调用BiometricService，最后落到系统层的OS Auth Prompt。
明白。中间需要经过local_auth插件这层吗？还是BiometricService直接调系统API？另外OS Auth Prompt的命名我看到文档里有个IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController的映射，需要体现在命名里吗？

对，要有local_auth插件这层，它是跨平台桥接。OS Auth Prompt的完整命名就用"OS Auth Prompt (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)"，保持和QuantumZero的Deliverable 1规范一致。BiometricService调用时要带一个参数标记IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic，插件层带IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode。
好的，我先画出主流程：Holder发起解锁，Flutter UI把authenticate请求发给BiometricService，BiometricService激活后调用local_auth插件，插件再唤起OS Auth Prompt。三层activate都标上。
主流程可以，但要加alt分支处理成功和失败两种情况。成功时逐层返回true，UI提示Access granted；失败或取消时返回false，提示Access denied。最后三层都要deactivate。
分支加好了。成功路径：OS回Success给Plugin，Plugin回true给Bio，Bio回true给UI，UI回Access granted给Holder。失败路径对应返回false和Access denied。三层deactivate放在end之后。
检查下颜色配置，要符合QuantumZero的palette：actors用#fff7e6/#b45309，system组件用#e0f2fe/#075985。还有autonumber要打开，User的别名标成Holder。
都配好了。标题是"Sequence Diagram - Mobile Biometric Authentication"，config里theme设成base，palette注释也加上了。User定义为actor User as Holder，autonumber开启。还有需要调整的吗？
没问题了，这个版本可以定稿。整个流程从Holder解锁到OS Auth Prompt的唤起，再到双分支结果返回，逻辑完整，也符合IoT工业控制器的安全认证场景。
